*Summary:* 3 issues found · Critical: 1 · Trivial: 1 · Noise: 1
*Tickets:* 2 created · 0 duplicates skipped · Incident mode: No

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-29|Server Actions build error — splitIntoBatches must be async>*
Events: 72 · New · Severity: Critical
Add `async` keyword to `splitIntoBatches` export in `actions.ts:104` or move it to a shared utility file.
🎫 <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-890/fix-non-async-splitintobatches-causing-server-actions-build-error|DEV-890> — Fix non-async splitIntoBatches causing Server Actions build error · Priority: Urgent · Labels: Bug, L

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-S|layout.tsx — Module not found: Can't resolve 'sonner'>*
Events: 2 · Recurring · Severity: Trivial
Run `pnpm add sonner` to install the missing toast library dependency.
🎫 <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-891/install-missing-sonner-package-to-fix-layouttsx-module-not-found-error|DEV-891> — Install missing sonner package to fix layout.tsx module not found error · Priority: Normal · Labels: Bug, S

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-8|Error: aborted — POST /[locale]>*
Events: 1 · Recurring · Severity: Noise
Single TCP abort from HeadlessChrome on localhost:3099 — likely a test runner cancellation, no action needed.

🎫 *Tickets Created (2):*

• <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-891/install-missing-sonner-package-to-fix-layouttsx-module-not-found-error|DEV-891> — Install missing sonner package to fix layout.tsx module not found error (Priority: Normal, S)
